zh.lifeSummary: 當David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell於1411年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie39歲，母親Mariotta Glen40歲。他於1436年6月29日與Lady Elizabeth Melville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年4月17日在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell于1411年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie39岁，母亲Mariotta Glen40岁。他于1436年6月29日与Lady Elizabeth Melville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1490年4月17日在英国苏格兰費伏享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boswell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Beuzeville-la-Giffard in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the ancient Germanic personal name Boso + ville ‘settlement’. The final element has been altered as a result of association with the common placename ending -well ‘spring, stream’. Some instances of Bovill may have the same origin.

variants.name: Buswell
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of   Boswell  , of Norman origin.

variants.name: Bovill
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in Normandy whose medieval forms share a similar range of variants, such as Bouville (Seine-Maritime), any of several places called Biéville (Calvados, Manche) or Biville (Manche, Seine-Maritime), Beuzeville-la-Giffard (Seine-Maritime), Boiville (Orne), and perhaps Boudeville (Seine-Maritime). See also   Boswell   and   Beville  .

variants.name: Biswell
meanings: English (Buckinghamshire): possibly from a lost or unidentified place called with Old English bēos ‘coarse grass’ + wella ‘spring, stream’. Alternatively, a variant of Boswell .

variants.name: Bussell
meanings: English: variant of   Boswell   (of Norman origin) or   Bissell   1.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell was born in 1411, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, was 39 and his mother, Mariotta Glen, was 40. He married Lady Elizabeth Melville on 29 June 1436. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 17 April 1490, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell est né en 1411, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mariotta Glen, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Melville le 29 juin 1436. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 17 avril 1490, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell 1411 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie 39 und seine Mutter Mariotta Glen 40. Er hat am 29. Juni 1436 Lady Elizabeth Melville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 17. April 1490 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell è nato il nel 1411 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Mariotta Glen, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Melville il 29 giugno 1436. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 17 aprile 1490, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswellが1411年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregieは39歳，母Mariotta Glenは40歳であった。1436年6月29日にLady Elizabeth Melvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年4月17日にイギリススコットランドフィフで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell(이)가 1411년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariotta Glen(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1436년 6월 29일 Lady Elizabeth Melville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 4월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell nasceu em 1411, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mariotta Glen, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Melville em 29 de junho de 1436. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de abril de 1490, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell родился в 1411 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariotta Glen, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Melville 29 июня 1436 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 17 апреля 1490 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Boswell - Fourth Lord of Balgregie, First Lord of Boswell nació en 1411, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Boswell - Third Lord of Balgregie, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mariotta Glen, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Melville el 29 de junio de 1436. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 17 de abril de 1490, en Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
